name: 10" x 8" Cheetah Framed Wall Art Canvas - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Gold Frame, Animal Print
description: The 10" x 8" Cheetah Framed Wall Art Canvas by Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee features a digital artwork highlighting a magnificent leopard set against a black backdrop. The gold frame boasts an ethnic motif and can be effortlessly hung using the saw tooth mount. The canvas's horizontal shape adds visual intrigue to your room. Accentuate your walls with the stealth animal canvas by Threshold, designed in partnership with Studio McGee.
